description: +25% weapon damage when you have not taken damage for 4 seconds. Taking damage cancels the buff for 4 seconds.
While near a skill or ally within 5 meters, gain +15% weapon damage.
While in cover, weapon damage is increased by 15%.
Killing an enemy grants 10% bonus armor for 10 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times. Refreshes on kill.
When within 10 meters of 2 or more enemies, gain 20% bonus armor for 5 seconds. Cooldown: 5 seconds.
Killing an enemy with a skill extends the duration of all active skills by 10% of their base duration. Max extension: 50%.
Shooting an enemy increases skill damage by 10% for 3 seconds.
Applying a status effect to an enemy grants 40% bonus armor to nearby allies within 20 meters for 10 seconds. Cooldown: 15 seconds.
Enemies you hit from behind take 10% amplified damage from all sources for 5 seconds.
Applying a status effect to an enemy increases your weapon damage by 18% for 10 seconds.
